_meta.scope_note: Bloom filter (BF.*) and Cuckoo filter (CF.*) commands. All entries verified against Redis 8.2.1 + RedisBloom 8.2.0 via tools/resp_inspect.py.
_meta.universal_errors: Per spec §6: `WRONGTYPE` if the key holds a value of an incompatible type, and module-not-loaded errors are not enumerated per command. Per-command operational errors (filter is full, item exists for BF.RESERVE, etc.) ARE enumerated where they're part of the documented contract.

returns.summary: Confirms a new Bloom filter was created at the key.

oneof.summary: Filter created with the requested error rate and capacity.

messages.summary: A key already exists at this name. Use a different key or delete the existing one first.

examples.label: key exists
examples.note: Returns an error reply (`item exists`); the example shows null because errors are raised as exceptions by most client libraries.

returns.summary: Whether the item was newly added to the filter.

resp2.summary: 1 if the item was newly added; 0 if it was probably already present (Bloom filters may report false positives).

resp3.summary: true if the item was newly added; false if it was probably already present (Bloom filters may report false positives).

returns.summary: Per-item add results, one per requested item, in the same order as the request.

resp2.summary: Per-item add results, in request order.

items.summary: 1 if newly added, 0 if probably already present.

resp3.summary: Per-item add results, in request order.

items.summary: true if newly added, false if probably already present.

returns.summary: Whether the item is probably in the filter.

resp2.summary: 1 if the item is probably present (subject to the configured false-positive rate); 0 if definitely not.

resp3.summary: true if the item is probably present (subject to the configured false-positive rate); false if definitely not.

returns.summary: Per-item membership results, one per requested item, in the same order as the request.

resp2.summary: Per-item membership results, in request order.

items.summary: 1 if probably present, 0 if definitely not.

resp3.summary: Per-item membership results, in request order.

items.summary: true if probably present, false if definitely not.

returns.summary: Number of items added to the filter.

resp2.summary: Count of items added to the filter, or 0 if the key does not exist.

returns.summary: Bloom filter metrics: capacity, current size, filter count, items inserted, and expansion rate. Field set is fixed; values are integers.

resp2.summary: Flat array of alternating metric name and integer value. Field set is fixed.

fields.name: Number of filters
fields.summary: Number of sub-filters currently allocated (scales up under load).

fields.name: Number of items inserted
fields.summary: Total items added since the filter was created.

fields.name: Expansion rate
fields.summary: Configured expansion factor when a sub-filter fills.

resp3.summary: Map of metric name to integer value. Field set is fixed; keys are unordered.

fields.name: Number of filters
fields.summary: Number of sub-filters currently allocated (scales up under load).

fields.name: Number of items inserted
fields.summary: Total items added since the filter was created.

fields.name: Expansion rate
fields.summary: Configured expansion factor when a sub-filter fills.

returns.summary: Confirms a new Cuckoo filter was created at the key.
Whether the item was added to the Cuckoo filter.

resp2.summary: 1 if added successfully. The Cuckoo filter may report failures if it cannot find space; in practice this manifests as an error rather than 0.

returns.summary: Whether the item is probably in the Cuckoo filter.

resp2.summary: 1 if the item is probably present (subject to the filter's false-positive rate); 0 if definitely not.

resp3.summary: true if the item is probably present; false if definitely not.

returns.summary: Approximate number of times the item was added (capped by filter precision; unlike Bloom filters, Cuckoo filters can count multi-insertions).

resp2.summary: Approximate count of how many times the item was added. May overcount due to hash collisions; will return 0 if the item is definitely not present.

returns.summary: Cuckoo filter metrics: size, bucket layout, insertion/deletion counts, expansion settings.

resp2.summary: Flat array of alternating metric name and integer value. Field set is fixed.

fields.name: Max iterations
fields.summary: Max iterations attempted to make room before reporting failure.

resp3.summary: Map of metric name to integer value. Field set is fixed; keys are unordered.

fields.name: Max iterations
fields.summary: Max iterations attempted to make room before reporting failure.
